body: ac-08 decision: test-gate-ac-verification.sh exercises orbit-acceptance.sh's stdin-mode parser, not promote.sh — unaffected by this port. Re-ran after promote.sh rewrite, still PASS. Kept as-is; no header annotation needed since the test is functionally independent of bd-era plumbing.

ac-09 follow-up: drive/SKILL.md and rally/SKILL.md still reference the bd-era folder layout (.orbit/specs/<id>/spec.yaml + .orbit/specs/<id>/drive.yaml). promote.sh now writes flat .orbit/specs/<id>.yaml per orbit-state v0.1, so the drive sidecar (drive.yaml) needs to migrate to .orbit/specs/<id>.drive.yaml and rally call sites need a parallel sweep. Out of scope for this spec — it is the script port only. Tracked here so the next /orb:drive session knows the workaround still applies until a follow-up spec lands.
